commands.cmd: read-only profile permission/settings, measurement schema/service/API/test and Trends chart map

summary: Mapped a three-query opt-in measurement-authorized weight trend with separately protected target, daily smoothing and safe axis semantics.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Scout exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM completed the same read-only map as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: A Judge must approve the measurement/profile authorization split, smoothing and safe-axis formula before implementation.
Card/planner preferences, household analysis, offline/performance documentation and rendered final evidence remain later tasks.
